scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @stickgame/web" "npm run dev -w @stickgame/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @stickgame/shared && npm run build -w @stickgame/web && npm run build -w @stickgame/server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @stickgame/shared && npm run test -w @stickgame/server && npm run test -w @stickgame/web
